ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., Presidential Election 2024) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, congressional, local) */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for voter registration */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* End date for voter registration */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who participated in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the county belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "voting_location" TEXT /* Physical location where voting takes place */,
  "voting_hours" TEXT /* Hours when the precinct is open for voting */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the candidate */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the candidate */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* Campaign website of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party (e.g., DEM, REP) */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "chairman" TEXT /* Name of the party's chairman */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the party's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the result belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the result belongs to */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the result belongs to */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate in the precinct */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Number of voters who participated in the precinct */,
  "early_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early votes received */,
  "mail_votes" INTEGER /* Number of mail-in votes received */,
  "provisional_votes" INTEGER /* Number of provisional votes received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, administrator, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an election official */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the official is participating in */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the election official (e.g., chief, assistant) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the election official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the election results */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the election results were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
